summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin/SuperAdmin Customer Service page overhaul. All 12 features verified: Sidebar 'Dashboards' submenu with 3 items (Analytics Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, CS Center Dashboard), CS Center page with Tickets/Statistics/Team tabs, AI Assistant + Create Ticket buttons, List/Grid view toggle, 8 items per page pagination, gradient backgrounds on cards, service-colored tags, Statistics tab with total/customer/operator counts + Team Workload with Open/Active/Done breakdown, compact Create Ticket modal (max-w-md), and ticket detail modal with colorful sidebar. Backend API /api/support-tickets/stats/detailed verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar 'Dashboards' submenu correctly implemented in useSidebarMenu.js with Analytics Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, CS Center Dashboard
No standalone 'Customer Service' item in sidebar - moved under Dashboards submenu as 'CS Center Dashboard'
CS Center page tabs: Tickets, Statistics, Team - using custom button design with bg-[#082c59] for active state
Statistics tab correctly fetches from /api/support-tickets/stats/detailed and displays: total, customer_total, operator_total, team_workload with Open/Active/Done counts, by_priority breakdown
Statistics tab has expandable Customer/Operator category breakdowns (click to expand functionality)
Create Ticket modal uses max-w-md for compact design with gradient background
Ticket detail modal has colorful sidebar sections: Status (styled), Priority (styled), Requester (indigo background), Category (amber background)
Conversation differentiation in ticket modal: staff replies bg-[#082c59]/[0.06], customer messages bg-white/60, internal notes bg-amber-50/70
Grid view implemented correctly with 3-column layout
Pagination shows 8 items per page (ITEMS_PER_PAGE constant set to 8 based on loadTickets params)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test tickets from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin CS page overhaul fully tested. Key UI changes: 1) Sidebar has 'Dashboards' expandable submenu with Analytics/Admin/CS Center Dashboard items, 2) CS page has Tickets/Statistics/Team tabs, 3) Statistics tab shows Total/Customer/Operator counts with expandable breakdowns + Team Workload with Open/Active/Done per member + Priority breakdown, 4) Tickets tab has AI Assistant + Create Ticket buttons, List/Grid toggle, 8-item pagination, 5) Create modal is compact max-w-md, 6) Ticket detail modal has colorful sidebar sections

sidebar_dashboards_submenu.details: Dashboards submenu expands to show: Analytics Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, CS Center Dashboard

no_standalone_customer_service.details: Customer Service removed from sidebar, accessible via Dashboards > CS Center Dashboard

cs_page_tabs.details: Three tabs visible: Tickets, Statistics, Team - with filled/outline button styling

tickets_tab_buttons.details: AI Assistant and Create Ticket buttons visible at top right of Tickets tab

list_grid_toggle.details: List and Grid view icons visible, toggle works correctly - Grid shows 3-column layout

pagination_8_items.details: Shows 8 of 13 - confirms 8 items per page with pagination (page 1, 2 buttons visible)

gradient_backgrounds.details: Ticket cards use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59]/[0.03] via-slate-50/50 to-slate-100/40

service_colored_tags.details: Tags with colors: technical=red, booking=blue, hotels=rose, payment=emerald, inquiry=slate

statistics_tab_counts.details: Shows Total Tickets (21), Customer Tickets (18) with Click to expand, Operator Tickets (3) with Click to expand

statistics_team_workload.details: Team Workload section shows members with Open/Active/Done counts: Ben Carter Kyle (0/1/1), Asco b (0/1/0), Cleaner T. (0/2/0), Super Admin (0/0/1)

create_ticket_modal_compact.details: Create Ticket on Behalf modal uses max-w-md with Customer/Operator toggle, user search, compact form layout

ticket_detail_modal_colorful_sidebar.details: Detail modal has colorful sidebar: Status/Priority with styled dropdowns, Requester with indigo bg, Category with amber bg

backend_stats_detailed_api.details: API /api/support-tickets/stats/detailed returns: total, customer_total, operator_total, team_workload with status breakdown, customer_by_category, operator_by_category, by_priority
